sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "projects" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "short_goal" TEXT NOT NULL, "why_chosen" TEXT NULL, "success_definition" TEXT NULL, "target_revenue_minor" INTEGER NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "icon_key" TEXT NULL, "accent_key" TEXT NULL, "primary_guide_document_id" TEXT NULL, "start_date" INTEGER NULL, "review_date" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ideas" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "note" TEXT NULL, "source" TEXT NULL, "disposition" TEXT NOT NULL, "converted_project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "captured_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "restart_capsules" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES projects (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "last_known_state" TEXT NULL, "last_output" TEXT NULL, "what_worked" TEXT NULL, "blocker" TEXT NULL, "next_action" TEXT NULL, "parked_reason" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "daily_check_ins" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "check_in_date" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE, "energy_level" TEXT NOT NULL, "available_minutes" INTEGER NOT NULL, "note" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sprints" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES projects (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "hypothesis" TEXT NULL, "start_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "end_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "target_outputs" INTEGER NULL, "success_criteria" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "daily_plans" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sprint_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sprints (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "plan_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "required_outcome" TEXT NOT NULL, "low_energy_action" TEXT NULL, "linked_guide_document_id" TEXT NULL, "linked_guide_page" INTEGER NULL, "note" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("sprint_id", "plan_date"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "daily_actions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "daily_plan_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES daily_plans (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "position" INTEGER NOT NULL, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_completed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_completed" IN (0, 1)), "completed_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("daily_plan_id", "position"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ship_records" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "daily_plan_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES daily_plans (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "output_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "output_title" TEXT NOT NULL, "external_url" TEXT NULL, "evidence_note" TEXT NULL, "is_partial" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_partial" IN (0, 1)), "shipped_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "guide_documents" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "original_file_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_title" TEXT NOT NULL, "stored_relative_path" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "file_size_bytes" INTEGER NOT NULL, "checksum" TEXT NULL, "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "category" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "when_to_read" TEXT NULL, "is_pinned" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_pinned" IN (0, 1)), "page_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_read_page" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "last_opened_at" INTEGER NULL, "imported_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "cleanup_needed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("cleanup_needed" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pdf_bookmarks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "document_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES guide_documents (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "page_number" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("document_id", "page_number"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pdf_notes" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "document_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES guide_documents (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "page_number" INTEGER NOT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "metric_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES projects (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "entry_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "outputs_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "views" INTEGER NULL, "clicks" INTEGER NULL, "orders" INTEGER NULL, "revenue_minor" INTEGER NULL, "work_minutes" INTEGER NULL, "note" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("project_id", "entry_date"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "weekly_reviews" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES projects (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "sprint_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES sprints (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "week_start" INTEGER NOT NULL, "week_end" INTEGER NOT NULL, "shipped_summary" TEXT NULL, "important_result" TEXT NULL, "worked_well" TEXT NULL, "waste_or_blocker" TEXT NULL, "decision" TEXT NOT NULL, "next_week_focus" TEXT NULL, "decision_applied_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("project_id", "week_start"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notification_preferences" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "morning_enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("morning_enabled" IN (0, 1)), "after_work_enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("after_work_enabled" IN (0, 1)), "evening_enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("evening_enabled" IN (0, 1)), "morning_minutes" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 480, "after_work_minutes" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1020, "evening_minutes" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1260, "time_zone_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Asia/Jakarta', "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sprint_closures" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sprint_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES sprints (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "decision" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(decision IN ('continueFocus', 'pivot', 'park')), "evidence_summary" TEXT NULL, "next_approach" TEXT NULL, "next_sprint_id" TEXT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES sprints (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "replacement_project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "closed_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
